/usr/bin/gcc -fharden-compares -fharden-conditional-branches -fno-sanitize-recover=all -fno-stack-limit -fsanitize-trap=all -fsanitize=unreachable -fstack-protector -fstack-protector-all -fstack-protector-strong -ftls-model=global-dynamic -fvtv-debug CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/network.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/client.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ncurses_ui.c.o -o main   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lcurses /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libform.so
